sn20.11:1.2: “Monks, did you hear that jackal1 howling in the last watch of the night?”
sn20.11:1.4: “That jackal is afflicted with a disease called mange.
sn20.11:1.5: Yet he goes wherever he likes,
sn20.11:1.9: and even a cool breeze blows on him.
sn20.11:1.10: “It would be good, monks, if a certain person here claiming to be a follower of the Sakyan were to experience a personal existence of that sort.2
sn20.11:1.13: That’s how you should train yourselves.”
